prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild forge, warm wood interior. A masculine mage in layered blue robes with floating spell tags and an androgynous scout in a cropped travel jacket and messenger straps work together at a wooden workbench. The mage steadies a damaged metal shield while the scout carefully guides a glowing repair tool along the surface. Warm, soft forge light, cinematic close-up, no text, no watermarks, consistent character designs.

Same continuous shot, Japanese fantasy RPG guild forge. The masculine mage continues to hold the shield steady with gloved hands. The androgynous scout taps the final repair mark on the shield with the tool, causing a gentle, harmless shimmer to seal the metal. Both characters share a focused, friendly expression of teamwork. Warm ambient lighting, cinematic, no text, no watermarks, consistent character appearance.
